allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'File: {c[\\"path\\"]}\\nLine: {c.get\(\\"line\\",\\"N/A\\"\)}\\nComment: {c[\\"body\\"]}\\n---'\) for c in data]")
